---
name: New Schematic Request
about: Request an entirely new schematic be added to the collection
title: "schematic: "
labels: new-schematic
assignees: ""
---

## Schematic Name

What would this schematic be called? (e.g., `eslint-config`, `husky-config`)

## Purpose

What does this schematic generate or configure?

## Generated Files / Changes

List the files that would be created or modified:

- `<file>` — description
- `<file>` — description

## Schema Options

List any configurable options the schematic should accept:

| Option | Type | Default | Description |
|--------|------|---------|-------------|
| | | | |

## Motivation

Why should this be included in `ag-schematics`? What Angular projects would benefit?

## Additional Context

Links, examples, or related tools that informed this request.
